declared.title: Shrinking Democracy, Growing Violence: Internet Shutdowns in 2023
declared.selection_rationale: Access Now's #KeepItOn annual shutdown report for 2023 (283 shutdowns documented across 39 countries, the highest count since tracking began in 2016). Includes all five target countries within its country-by-country findings. Coverage-contribution value: documents the same 2023-2024 period as this corpus's OONI and Freedom House entries but from Access Now's own cross-country shutdown-tracking methodology — a genuinely different organizational account of an overlapping period, not a duplicate. Publication date approximate (month/year confirmed via the file's own URL path, exact day not independently confirmed from the document's title page).
